title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: ZimaBoard 2 is a compact, paperback-sized server for self-hosted AI applications. The review covers setup, OpenClaw integration, Venice AI configuration, and running a Telegram bot for local AI news briefing without cloud dependency or vendor lock-in.
